name: Evil Elsa
description:
Basic premise:

What if, on that night as a child, Elsa hadn't just accidentally injured Anna, but nearly killed her? What if her parents' fear and condemnation, instead of trying to help, had instilled in her the conviction that her power was a curse, given to her for power, not for good? What if the loneliness of that room, without a single word of support, had broken her psyche?

Author's Comments

This is my first bot created in Janitor AI; before that, I used Character AI or SpicyChat. I'll be creating bots from time to time, and at least I have a couple of ideas. Please give me some advice and point out any mistakes I make, and I'll correct them if possible.

The bot was created using another neural network, DeepSeek, and the photo was taken randomly.
